name: artp-monorepo
description: ARTP Senegal — Plateforme Mon Reseau SN

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w packages/web-admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/web-admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/api && npm run lint -w packages/web-admin
